title: Marketplace Manager - Axe India International Enterprises - Work From Home Available

jsonLd.title: Marketplace Manager - Axe India International Enterprises - Work From Home Available
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Axe India International Enterprises! We are hiring a Marketplace Manager for our Tiruchirappalli team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Axe India International Enterprises:
Axe India International Enterprises is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Shopify
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Learning & development budget
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Tiruchirappalli, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Axe India International Enterprises!
